# Cognetex Full Context

## Company Profile
Cognetex is a premier AI & Software Development agency. We bridge the gap between business logic and distributed system design. Every engagement is led by senior talent with hands-on implementation experience.

## Detailed Services

### Agentic & Generative AI
Systems that move beyond static automation. We deploy custom LLM architectures (Llama, Mistral) that ingest proprietary data via RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) and take autonomous actions using agents.
- Capabilites: RAG Implementation, Fine-tuning, LangChain/LlamaIndex Integration.

### Full-Cycle Engineering
High-throughput backends and blazing-fast frontends.
- Stack: React, TypeScript, Rust, Node.js, Go.
- Architecture: Microservices, Serverless, Event-driven.

### Data Engineering
Robust ETL pipelines and vector search capabilities.
- Stack: BigQuery, Snowflake, Postgres, Pinecone, Weaviate.

## Proven ROI (Case Studies)
- FinTech: Reduced daily financial log processing from 48h to real-time (<200ms). Saved $2M+ annually.
- E-Commerce: Automated 1M+ support tickets with <2s response time. 70% ticket reduction.

## Leadership
- Abbas Ahsan (CEO & Chief Architect): Distributed system design expert.
- Manahil Ahmed (Lead AI Research): NLP and Transformer specialist.
- Jahanzeb Khan (Senior Backend): High-traffic infrastructure expert.
- Abdullah Farooqui (Head of Frontend): Performance-obsessed UI lead.

## Tech Stack
Modeling: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Transformers.
Orchestration: LangChain, LlamaIndex, Temporal.
Infrastructure: AWS, GCP, Kubernetes, Terraform.
Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry.

## Contact
Email: contact@cognetex.com
URL: https://cognetex.com
Location: Dubai, UAE (Remote-First Global)
